Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UnnamedTable5.Width = 10 UnnamedTable7.Width = 10 Grid.Rows = Page.Rows DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Operações que sou Contratante' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &OpeDta_To.IsEmpty() and &OpeDta.IsEmpty() &OpeDta_To = serverdate() &OpeDta = &OpeDta_To - 30 EndIf EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &Visualizar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &auxUpdate.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' OpeDta.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' OpeNroCiot.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' &OrigemDestino.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &OpeTipPgt.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &OpePgtVal.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &OpeTotAdi.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &OpeTotQui.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &OpeTotVia.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' OpeSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' &ACOES.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Visualizar = !'' If (Not OpeNroCiot.IsEmpty()) &Visualizar.Class = !'Attribute' Else &Visualizar.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &auxUpdate = !'' If (OpeSts <> Status_Ciot.Cancelado) &auxUpdate.Class = !'Attribute' Else &auxUpdate.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ACOES.Clear() &ACOES.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &ACOES.AddItem(1, 'Clonar Operação') If (Not OpeNroCiot.IsEmpty()) &ACOES.AddItem(2, 'Obter PDF deste CIOT') Endif If (Not OpeNroCiot.IsEmpty() And OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Autorizado) &ACOES.AddItem(3, 'Adicionar Pagamento') Endif If (OpeTipVia = eFRETE_TipoViagem.TAC_Agregado And OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Autorizado) &ACOES.AddItem(4, 'Adicionar Viagem') Endif If (OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Autorizado) &ACOES.AddItem(5, 'Cancelar este CIOT') Endif If (OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Autorizado) &ACOES.AddItem(6, 'Retificar este CIOT') Endif If (1 = 2) &ACOES.AddItem(7, 'Excluir Operação') Endif If (OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Autorizado) &ACOES.AddItem(8, 'Encerrar este CIOT') Endif If OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Cancelado &Visualizar.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn' &auxUpdate.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough' OpeDta.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' OpeNroCiot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' &OrigemDestino.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &OpeTipPgt.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &OpePgtVal.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &OpeTotAdi.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &OpeTotQui.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &OpeTotVia.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' OpeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' &ACOES.ColumnClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn WWColumnLineThrough' Else &Visualizar.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &auxUpdate.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' OpeDta.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' OpeNroCiot.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' &OrigemDestino.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &OpeTipPgt.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &OpePgtVal.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &OpeTotAdi.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &OpeTotQui.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &OpeTotVia.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' Do Case Case OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Digitando OpeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Autorizado OpeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Encerrado OpeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise OpeSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase &ACOES.ColumnClass = 'WWActionGroupColumn' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do 'LoadCIOT' EndEvent Event &ACOES.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ACOES = 1 Do 'Do ClonarOpe' Case &ACOES = 2 Do 'Do ObterOperacaoTransportePdf' Case &ACOES = 3 Do 'Do AdicionarPagamento' Case &ACOES = 4 Do 'Do AdicionarViagem' Case &ACOES = 5 Do 'Do CancelarOperacaoTransporte' Case &ACOES = 6 Do 'Do RetificarOperacaoTransporte' Case &ACOES = 7 Do 'Do Excluir' Case &ACOES = 8 Do 'Do EncerrarOperacaoTransporte' EndCase &ACOES = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ClonarOpe_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcOperacaoTransporteClonar.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, OpeDta, OpeNroCiot, &OrigemDestino, &OpeTipPgt, OpeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ClonarOpe_Modal.Close If ClonarOpe_Modal.Result = 'Ok' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIf EndEvent Event AdicionarPagamento_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcOperacaoTransporteAdicionarPagamento.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeNroCiot) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AdicionarPagamento_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event CancelarOperacaoTransporte_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcOperacaoTransporteCancelarOperacao.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event CancelarOperacaoTransporte_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPOperacaoTransporte.Call(&PreviousStep, &CurrentStep, &GoingBack) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ClonarOpe' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ClonarOpe_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ObterOperacaoTransportePdf' prcNovoEFrete_Login.Call(&Token, &ProtocoloServico, &StatusLogin) If &StatusLogin = 200 prcNovoEFRETE_GerarPDF.Call(OpeNroCiot, &Token, &StatusPDF, &NomeArquivo) If &StatusPDF = 200 OpenNewWindow.LinkOpen = &NomeArquivo OpenNewWindow.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Não foi possível gerar o PDF. ERRO: ' + Trim(Str(&StatusPDF)), DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf Else Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", &StatusLogin.ToString(), DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf If not &Token.Trim().IsEmpty() prcNovoEFrete_Logout.Call(&Token, &StatusLogOut) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AdicionarPagamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AdicionarPagamento_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AdicionarViagem' &WebSession.Remove('WpOperacaoTransporteAdicionarViagem_Data') &WizardDataAdicionarViagem.Viagem.OpeNroCiot = OpeNroCiot &WizardDataAdicionarViagem.Viagem.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardDataAdicionarViagem.Viagem.OpeCod = OpeCod &WizardDataAdicionarViagem.Viagem.FilCod = FilCod &WebSession.Set('WpOperacaoTransporteAdicionarViagem_Data', &WizardDataAdicionarViagem.ToJson()) WPOperacaoTransporteAdicionarViagem.Call(!'BemVindo', !'Viagem', &GoingBack) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarOperacaoTransporte' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ CancelarOperacaoTransporte_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RetificarOperacaoTransporte' If 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WpOperacaoTransporteRetificar.Call(&PreviousStep, &CurrentStep, &GoingBack) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &WebSession.Remove('WpOperacaoTransporteRetificar_Data') &WizardDataRetificar.Confirmar.OpeNroCiot = OpeNroCiot &WizardDataRetificar.Confirmar.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardDataRetificar.Confirmar.OpeCod = OpeCod &WizardDataRetificar.Confirmar.FilCod = FilCod &WebSession.Set('WpOperacaoTransporteRetificar_Data', &WizardDataRetificar.ToJson()) WPOperacaoTransporteRetificar.Call(!'BemVindo', !'Confirmar', &GoingBack) EndIf EndSub Sub 'Do Excluir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EncerrarOperacaoTransporte' If 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WpOperacaoTransporteEncerrar.PopUp(&PreviousStep, &CurrentStep, &GoingBack) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &WebSession.Remove('WpOperacaoTransporteEncerrar_Data') &WizardDataEncerrar.Encerrar.OpeNroCiot = OpeNroCiot &WizardDataEncerrar.Encerrar.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardDataEncerrar.Encerrar.OpeCod = OpeCod &WizardDataEncerrar.Encerrar.FilCod = FilCod &WebSession.Set('WpOperacaoTransporteEncerrar_Data', &WizardDataEncerrar.ToJson()) WPOperacaoTransporteEncerrar.Call(!'BemVindo', !'Encerrar', &GoingBack) EndIf EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"OPENROCIOT" &OpeNroCiot.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"OPEDTA" &OpeDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &OpeDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"OPESTS" &OpeSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILOPESTS" &FilOpeSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"OPENROCIOT", "", not &OpeNroCiot.IsEmpty(), 0, &OpeNroCiot, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"OPEDTA", "", not (&OpeDta.IsEmpty() AND &OpeDta_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &OpeDta.ToString().Trim(), &OpeDta_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"OPESTS", "", not &OpeSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &OpeSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILOPESTS", "", not &FilOpeSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilOpeSts, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"OperacaoTransporte" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &auxUpdate.Click &WebSession.Remove('WPOperacaoTransporte_Data') &WizardData.Inicio.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardData.Inicio.FilCod = FilCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeCod = OpeCod &WebSession.Set('WPOperacaoTransporte_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) WPOperacaoTransporte.Call(!'BemVindo', !'Inicio', &GoingBack) EndEvent Event &Visualizar.Click WpVisualizarCIOT.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod) EndEvent Sub 'LoadCIOT' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod Where EmpCod = EmpCod Where FilCod = FilCod Where OpeCod = OpeCod &OrigemDestino.SetEmpty() If OpeEmiGra = True &OpeTipPgt = 'TRANSFERÊNCIA BANCÁRIA' Else &OpeTipPgt = 'eFRETE' EndIf For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpePgtCod &OpePgtVal = OpePgtVal Exit EndFor If OpeTipVia = PefServiceTipoViagem.TAC_Agregado &QtdViagem = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeViaCod Where OpeViaSts = Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO &QtdViagem += 1 EndFor &OrigemDestino = 'TAC-AGREGADO COM ' + Trim(Str(&QtdViagem)) Do Case Case &QtdViagem = 1 &OrigemDestino += ' VIAGEM' OtherWise &OrigemDestino += ' VIAGENS' EndCase EndIf For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeViaCod &AuxOpeViaCod = OpeViaCod &OpeTotVia = OpeTotOpe If &OrigemDestino.IsEmpty() &AuxCidIBGE = OpeOriCidCod &AuxUfeCod = OpeOriCidUfe Do 'GetCidade' &OrigemDestino = Trim(OpeOriCidUfe) + ' - ' + Trim(&AuxCidNom) &AuxCidIBGE = OpeDstCidCod &AuxUfeCod = OpeDstCidUfe Do 'GetCidade' &OrigemDestino += ' / ' + Trim(OpeDstCidUfe) + ' - ' + Trim(&AuxCidNom) EndIf For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeViaCod, OpeValCod Where OpeViaCod = &AuxOpeViaCod &OpeTotAdi = OpeTotAdi &OpeTotQui = OpeTotQui Exit EndFor Exit When None If OpeTipVia = PefServiceTipoViagem.Padrao &OrigemDestino = 'N/A' EndIf EndFor Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetCidade' For Each Order EmpCod, CidCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where UfeCod = &AuxUfeCod Where CidIBGE = &AuxCidIBGE &AuxCidNom = CidNom.Trim() Exit EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
